meta.label: Retail
meta.description: Goldenwave Goods — high-volume online + brick-and-mortar gift shop. Daily Stripe + Square payouts, weekly inventory burn, tight margins.

explanations.explanation: By the week of May 4, your projected balance falls to about $2,075 — about $2,925 below your $5,000 floor. The biggest hits this week are ADP PAYROLL HOURLY (~$13,400), KLAVIYO MARKETING (~$540), COMCAST BUSINESS INTERNET (~$279). One concrete lever: consider asking a top customer to settle a few days earlier so cash lands before payday, or move payroll to the day after the largest retainer hits.

By the week of June 1, your projected balance falls to about $1,498 — about $3,502 below your $5,000 floor. The biggest hits this week are ADP PAYROLL HOURLY (~$13,400), ANTHEM BCBS GROUP HEALTH (~$3,100), KLAVIYO MARKETING (~$540). One concrete lever: consider asking a top customer to settle a few days earlier so cash lands before payday, or move payroll to the day after the largest retainer hits.
